leaveEmptyToKeep: Leave empty to keep current value
fillOnlyToChangeApiKey: Only fill in if you want to change the API key
fillOnlyToChangeUsername: Only fill in if you want to change the username
fillOnlyToChangePassword: Only fill in if you want to change the password
fillOnlyToChangeTenantId: Only fill in if you want to change the Tenant ID
fillOnlyToChangeClientId: Only fill in if you want to change the Client ID
fillOnlyToChangeClientSecret: Only fill in if you want to change the Client Secret
testConnectionRequiresAllFields: Enter Tenant ID, Client ID and Client Secret to test the connection
